session.resumeNote: All 8 documents fully populated. Codebase explored and all persona discussions recorded. No further work needed unless scope changes.

codebaseExploration.summary: Angular 18.2, Supabase (PostgreSQL), HashLocationStrategy, OnPush CD, RxJS BehaviorSubjects, OMDB + DTDD APIs, GitHub Pages hosting. 13 routes, ~15 services, 20+ components.

keyDecisions: Soft deletes stay for undo UX
Normalize movie_cast to actors table for better profile stats
Add indexes on foreign keys and frequently queried columns
Retain soft delete pattern on suggestions
Add user_preferences table for per-member settings
Migrate from NgModule to standalone components in rebuild
Adopt Angular signals for state (replace BehaviorSubjects)
Move profile stat queries to Supabase RPC functions
Add httpClient-based interceptor layer for error handling
All 13 routes documented with guard, component, query params, data deps
Extract shared RatingBadge, ScoreChip, MemberAvatar as reusable
Flag Discovery as stub needing real implementation
Full feature list with user stories
Improvement suggestions from user + QA perspectives
All 6 themes documented with hex values
GitHub Actions pipeline documented step by step

personaRoster.ProductOwner: PO — feature scope, user stories, priorities, what matters to the group
personaRoster.DatabaseArchitect: DBA — schema design, normalization, RLS, indexes, RPCs
personaRoster.Developer: Dev — Angular patterns, code quality, state mgmt, tech choices
personaRoster.UIUX: UX — flows, accessibility, theming, responsiveness, delight
personaRoster.QA: QA — edge cases, error states, test coverage gaps
personaRoster.CasualUser: User — real pain points, what delights, what confuses
